title: Payroll
subtitle: Monthly pay calculation, insurance and personal income tax

runs.hint: Each pay run aggregates pay, insurance and tax for every payable employee.

empty.title: No pay runs yet
empty.body: Pick a month and create your first pay run to start calculating payroll.

recompute.title: Recompute run {{period}}?
recompute.body: Lines are recomputed from current salaries, attendance and settings. Draft runs only.

submit.title: Submit run {{period}} for approval?
submit.body: The run moves to Pending approval and is sent to users with approval rights. You will not be able to recompute it until it is approved or rejected.

approve.title: Approve run {{period}}?
approve.body: The current payroll settings are frozen onto the run and it is locked. It cannot be edited after approval.

reject.title: Reject run {{period}}?
reject.body: The run returns to Draft so HR can edit it and submit again for approval.

mark-paid.title: Mark run {{period}} as paid?
mark-paid.body: Confirm this run has been disbursed. Its status becomes Paid.

cancel.title: Cancel run {{period}}?
cancel.body: The run becomes Cancelled. You can re-create a run for the same month afterwards.

toast.createErrorBody: An approved or paid run may already exist for this month.

submit.error: Could not submit run for approval

mark-paid.error: Could not mark run as paid

empty.title: No employees found
empty.body: Adjust the search or department filter to see employees.

errors.baseSalary: Base salary must be a non-negative amount.
errors.effectiveFrom: Effective date must be a valid date.

toast.tryAgain: Please check the effective date and try again.

history.title: Salary history
history.subtitle: Effective-dated history for {{name}} · {{code}}
history.confirmBody: This reopens the previous record. Only the most recent record can be removed.

toast.headOnly: Only the most recent salary record may be removed.

settings.title: Payroll settings
settings.subtitle: Insurance rates, deductions and the tax table used when running payroll
settings.taxBracketsHint: Each bracket applies to taxable income. Leave the last bracket's bound empty for the open-ended top rate.

mine.subtitle: Your monthly payslips
mine.hint: Tap a payslip to see the full breakdown of pay, insurance and tax.

empty.title: No payslips yet
empty.body: Your payslips will appear here once a pay run is approved.

runDetail.title: Pay run {{period}}
runDetail.subtitle: Tap an employee to see their payslip breakdown.
runDetail.empty: This run has no payslip lines.
runDetail.exportError: Could not export the pay run
